creator: maho@FreeBSD.org
text:
Floating point exceptions occurs with Ghostscript 8.63/many printer (escpage and others)

 - bjc880j
 - lips4
 - lips2p
 - lips3
 - lp2000
 - escpage
 - npdl
 - rpdl

etc.

See http://bugs.ghostscript.com/show_bug.cgi?id=690122 for details.

Fix: 

Apply patch from here
http://svn.ghostscript.com/viewvc?view=rev&revision=9192
How-To-Repeat: % gs -sDEVICE=escpage -sOutPutFile=x test.ps
GPL Ghostscript 8.63 (2008-08-01)
